headline: Revenue & Sales Operations Leader | Scaling revenue and operations with Automation & AI
about:
I help commercial and operations teams scale without hiring more people by eliminating manual processes and bottlenecks through applied automation and AI.

I bring 15+ years leading sales and operations in banking, retail, and contact centers, managing large teams, strict KPIs, and highly regulated environments. This background allows me to quickly identify where time, money, or focus is being lost — and turn that into practical solutions that work in real, day-to-day operations.

Today, I act as a bridge between business, product, and technology. I don’t wait for “IT availability”: I identify the problem, design a first functional solution, validate it with real users, and take it to production — or scale it alongside engineering teams.

Recent results

Automated 70%+ of critical operational processes, eliminating recurring manual work

Deployed AI-powered conversational assistants in production, expanding service availability from 8 to 24 hours

Built AI-driven scheduling systems that reduce friction and free teams to focus on higher-value work

Currently, I design and implement automation and applied AI solutions for healthcare and field services companies, with systems actively running in production (WhatsApp, scheduling, and real-time operations).

Open to

Full-time roles in Fintech, B2B SaaS, BPO, or companies undergoing digital transformation

Consulting projects focused on automation and applied AI for sales and operations

headline: Strategic Delivery Leader | Cross-Functional Enablement | Product Discovery & Customer Engagement
about:
I operate at the intersection of product, delivery, and customer success, helping teams and stakeholders make sense of complex solutions, align around outcomes, and move forward with clarity.

My experience spans co-founding and scaling global engineering teams to leading strategic delivery initiatives in large enterprises. At the same time, my formal title has varied, from VP to Director to Engineer. My core value lies in enabling people: empowering internal teams, guiding customers through discovery, and driving execution across cross-functional environments.

I thrive in early conversations, when we’re still shaping the problem and exploring what’s possible. I help teams see the path ahead, connect the dots, and build momentum.

What I bring:
	•	Strategic delivery leadership in fast-moving, ambiguous contexts
	•	Experience coaching technical talent and scaling global teams
	•	Customer-first mindset with the ability to translate between business needs and technical direction
	•	A calm, focused approach to navigating complexity and stakeholder alignment

Career Highlights:
	•	Helped grow Bhuma from an early-stage product into a globally adopted data apps platform, leading operations, engineering strategy, and customer onboarding.
	•	Supported large-scale enablement efforts across global delivery teams, focusing on training, prototyping, and documentation that drives adoption.
	•	Mentored emerging leaders and contributors through post-M&A transitions and new platform rollouts.

I’m always open to conversations about product discovery, cross-team execution, and how we build better systems, not just in software but also in how we work.

headline: CEO @ Abstract | Product Manager | Software Engineer
about:
I’m a software engineer turned product leader with a strong background in full stack development — and that technical foundation has shaped the way I build, lead, and scale products. I started my career writing code, and that experience helps me deeply understand what it takes to bring great ideas to life.

Today, I’m the CEO of Abstract, a developer-first SaaS company where we build APIs that solve everyday technical problems like email validation, IP geolocation, and fraud detection. I joined the company in 2023 as Head of Product, was promoted to General Manager (leading Product and Marketing), and now lead the entire business, including Finance and Legal. I’ve helped grow the team, improve the product, and drive acquisition through SEO, paid ads, and fast product iteration.

Before Abstract, I led the Live Shopping product at VTEX — launching it from scratch to over 250 paying customers and $500k in ARR in just over a year. I owned the full product lifecycle, from strategy to go-to-market, and helped shape a new category in the eCommerce space.

Earlier in my career, I was part of GoJiraf, where I helped pivot the company from a user-content platform to a live shopping solution that now powers hundreds of eCommerce brands across LATAM.

I care deeply about building simple, useful products — and I believe the best product leaders are the ones who can speak both user and developer fluently.

As CEO of Abstract, I lead the company’s strategic direction across product, growth, operations, and finance. I oversee a lean, high-impact team building developer-first APIs used by thousands of companies worldwide.

- Implemented scalable operational processes, improving delivery speed and cross-team alignment.
- Maintaining hands-on involvement with GTM, particularly SEO and paid acquisition performance.

headline: Product Manager | Discovery-to-Launch Strategy  | GTM | AI to Sharpen Product Thinking | Market Research | User Insights | Storytelling
about:
My secret PMM skill? Asking the one question no one wants to hear: ‘Did we validate this?’

I’ve worked across pharma, fintech, SaaS, and media—across Argentina, Spain, and the U.S.—and across every type of “we need it for yesterday” environment. 

I’ve built go-to-market strategies, led product launches, mapped user journeys, and turned market research into messaging that moves.

At 22, I led my first marketing team. 
At 25, I rewrote a company’s entire positioning.
At 27, I helped launch a product with a name we forgot to test—and it accidentally worked (long story, great ending).

I’ve outgrown the idea that we have to “fit in.” I’m more interested in spaces that challenge me, elevate my thinking, and allow mistakes with purpose. Environments where excellence includes emotional intelligence. Roles where I can grow with people who are smarter than me.

No, I’m not your user.
But I’ll probably talk to them, understand them, and build a product story they’ll want to stay for.

Reach out — worst case, we swap memes.

headline: Product Marketing Manager | PMM | GTM | Product Marketing
about:
Product Marketing Manager with 12+ years of experience in digital marketing, growth, and strategic communication.

I work at the intersection of product, marketing, sales, and customer success, aligning value propositions with real market needs to drive acquisition, activation, and sustainable growth. My core pillars are data analysis, customer-centric communication, and cross-functional collaboration.

Over my career, I've built experience in agencies, startups, and tech companies, leading go-to-market strategies, product launches, SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) content initiatives, marketing automation, and revenue architecture (RevOps).

Before focusing on product, I worked with brands such as Pepsi, Burger King, Vivo, Supergasbras, 3M, and Pernambucanas at agencies like RAPP and Ginga, where I led content, social media, and strategic planning teams. I also founded and ran my own culinary brand, Tortappetit, gaining hands-on experience in branding, pricing strategy, digital marketing, and customer experience.

Currently, I’m Product Marketing Manager at Granatum, a tech startup that offers financial management tools for small businesses. I lead initiatives focused on acquisition, conversion, positioning, and retention. I’m also completing the Product Master track at PM3, which includes specialized courses in Product Management, Product Marketing, Product Growth, AI for Product, and more.

I hold a degree in Journalism from UNESP, a postgraduate degree in Social Media & Digital Communication, and international experience studying in Dublin, Ireland. My work has been recognized with awards from festivals such as The Smarties Awards and the Lusophone Creativity Awards.
